rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the intended target component or implementation while preserving AADL architecture
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes when referring to component ports
Use implementation scopes for implementation-level bindings after subcomponents and connections
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Ground every AGREE variable in the current AADL model or an explicit declaration
generic_rules: Preserve existing AADL architecture when inserting AGREE annex blocks
Ensure all AGREE identifiers are grounded in the current AADL model or explicitly declared
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for AGREE contracts
Declare equations with `eq name : type = expression;` and constants with `const name : type = value;`
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
Place AGREE contracts inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without explicit ports or constants
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless properly represented
